purpose: Fresh browser validation rerun after San Jacinto road geometry generation and runtime wiring.
browserValidationBlocker: No executable browser was available in the local validation environment, and installing Playwright from npm was blocked by registry policy.

countySelection.notes: Static selector evidence confirms San Jacinto County (validation only) remains present.

awarenessSelection.notes: Coldspring remains registered to san-jacinto-tx; browser selection was not executable.

boundary.notes: Audit remains honest and visual correctness is not force-passed; live audit output was not captured.

reportVisibility.notes: Fresh browser hazard submission was not completed.

roadResolution.notes: Road geometry is wired statically, but browser-observed road-name resolution was not captured.

alertWording.notes: Alert panel wording was not reviewed in a browser.

awarenessWording.notes: Top Awareness, Awareness Brief, and Location card were not reviewed in a browser.

countReconciliation.notes: Visible count surfaces were not reconciled in a browser.

crossCountyValidation.notes: Dayton/Willis/Coldspring switching sequence was not executed in a browser.

auditReliability.notes: Audit output could not be compared against browser-observed behavior.

recommendedNextMilestone: V650R.12 — San Jacinto Browser Validation Environment Remediation and Rerun
mergeRecommendation: Merge only as validation-status documentation. No activation or production behavior change is authorized.
